title: agrostis rudis
intro: Agrostis rudis, also known as rough bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly found in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis rudis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Agrostis rudis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
